app_idea: Users enter debts + minimums. App generates avalanche/snowball plans, payoff calendar, and weekly 'what to pay next' checklist. Exports a simple PDF plan to share with a spouse.
marketing_angle: Stop guessing. Get a debt payoff plan you can follow week-by-week and watch your balances finally drop.

app_idea: Users upload contracts. App highlights risky clauses, auto-renews, and hidden fees in plain English with red/yellow/green indicators.
marketing_angle: Stop signing contracts you don't understand. See the red flags in plain English before it's too late.

app_idea: Scans inbox for subscription receipts and renewal notices. Builds a dashboard of all recurring charges, shows monthly burn, and generates cancel scripts/emails.
marketing_angle: You're bleeding money on subscriptions. Scan your inbox, see everything you're paying for, and kill what you don't need.

app_idea: Upload resume + job description. AI rewrites bullet points to pass ATS filters and outputs tailored versions.
marketing_angle: Your resume is being rejected by robots. Fix it in 30 seconds and get more interviews.

app_idea: AI rewrites LinkedIn headlines, about sections, and experience for recruiter keywords with multiple tone variants.
marketing_angle: Your LinkedIn is your billboard. Rewrite it in 2 minutes and get more recruiter messages.

app_idea: AI texts users daily via SMS/WhatsApp to enforce habits, track streaks, and celebrate wins.
marketing_angle: Your resolutions are dying. Get an AI partner that texts you every day until you stick to your goals.

app_idea: Users swipe transactions as business or personal and export accountant-ready CSVs.
marketing_angle: Finish months of bookkeeping in 20 minutes.

app_idea: AI toolkit to generate scripts, voiceovers, and image prompts for faceless YouTube channels.
marketing_angle: Start a faceless YouTube channel this weekend.

app_idea: Users forward promo emails. AI finds unsubscribe links and enables bulk removal.
marketing_angle: Clean your inbox in one click.

app_idea: Locks phone into focus mode; breaking it triggers a monetary penalty.
marketing_angle: Lock your phone. If you break, you pay.

app_idea: Premium Notion workspace for habits, goals, tasks, and finance.
marketing_angle: One dashboard for your entire life.

app_idea: Chrome extension that auto-fills and drafts job application answers using AI.
marketing_angle: Apply to 50 jobs in the time it takes to apply to 1.

app_idea: Mock behavioral interviews with AI scoring and feedback.
marketing_angle: Practice until you're ready to nail the real interview.

app_idea: AI ranks dating photos and rewrites bios to optimize matches.
marketing_angle: Better photos. Better bio. More matches.

app_idea: AI roasts dating profiles, then rewrites them for higher conversion.
marketing_angle: It might be your profile. Let AI fix it.

app_idea: Side-by-side comparison of job offers including salary, equity, and benefits.
marketing_angle: See which offer is actually worth more.

app_idea: Calculates PTO strategies to maximize vacation days.
marketing_angle: Turn 10 days of PTO into 35 days off.

app_idea: Estimates quarterly tax payments and sends reminders.
marketing_angle: Know exactly what to set aside so taxes don't wreck you.

app_idea: Photo → pricing → SEO-optimized eBay listing text.
marketing_angle: Snap a photo. Copy the text. Get paid.

app_idea: Turns fridge photos into recipes using ingredients about to expire.
marketing_angle: Stop throwing food away.

app_idea: AI evaluates side-hustle ideas with brutal honesty and a viability score.
marketing_angle: Find out if your idea is actually worth building.

app_idea: 30-day survival plan for newly unemployed users.
marketing_angle: A plan for your first month after a layoff.

app_idea: Gamified sobriety tracker with streaks and savings.
marketing_angle: Track your Dry January wins.

app_idea: Point camera at gym machine to see how to use it instantly.
marketing_angle: Never feel lost at the gym again.

app_idea: Tracks Buy Now Pay Later payments to prevent overdrafts.
marketing_angle: No more surprise Klarna hits.

app_idea: Paid boilerplate codebase for developers with auth, billing, and user dashboard pre-wired.
marketing_angle: Skip weeks of boilerplate. Start your next SaaS with auth and billing already done.

app_idea: Users enter bill type (internet/phone/insurance) + current price + competitor price. AI generates call, chat, and objection-handling scripts. Tracks savings.
marketing_angle: Save $50–$200/month with better scripts. Tell AI your bill and get a negotiation script in 30 seconds.
